message: test: share config audit record setup

files.patch:
@@ -10,32 +10,36 @@ import {
   resolveConfigAuditLogPath,
 } from "./io.audit.js";
 
+function createAuditRecordBase(configPath: string) {
+  return createConfigWriteAuditRecordBase({
+    configPath,
+    env: {} as NodeJS.ProcessEnv,
+    existsBefore: true,
+    previousHash: "prev-hash",
+    nextHash: "next-hash",
+    previousBytes: 12,
+    nextBytes: 24,
+    previousMetadata: {
+      dev: "10",
+      ino: "11",
+      mode: 0o600,
+      nlink: 1,
+      uid: 501,
+      gid: 20,
+    },
+    changedPathCount: 1,
+    hasMetaBefore: true,
+    hasMetaAfter: true,
+    gatewayModeBefore: "local",
+    gatewayModeAfter: "local",
+    suspicious: [],
+    now: "2026-04-07T08:00:00.000Z",
+  });
+}
